name: Scallion Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 pounds boneless, skinned chicken thighs, trimmed of fat
1 bunch green onions, cut into 3-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine shallots, ginger, garlic, soy sauce, vinegar, honey, and sesame oil in a bowl.
2. Add chicken and scallions; toss to coat evenly.
3. Preheat the broiler.
4. Line the broiler pan rack with aluminum foil and spray with nonstick cooking spray.
5. Thread chicken alternately with scallions on 4 metal skewers, each about 8 inches long.
6. Place the skewers on the prepared rack.
7. Reserve the honey mixture for later use.
8. Broil the chicken 5 inches from the heat for 7 minutes, turning occasionally.
9. Continue broiling until the chicken is no longer pink in the center (another 6 minutes).
10. In a saucepan, boil the reserved honey mixture for 2 minutes.
11. Transfer the cooked chicken to a platter and pour the sauce over it.
